Yh np man and hf
does enhancing a wheel past +3 enhance the effects of it or the main stat, or is it just completely static after that
Every additional Enlightenment after E3 will only raise the Primary Stat of the WoD, with the sole exception of +12 which will also allow you to equip a second SSR WoD on the same Character
I've just finished maxing rewinding time, which feel should I be going for next in that shop?
Depends
If you have GHelot / Mouch, there can be an argument for raising Lotan WoD next
Otherwise, you're probably going to be raising Doll WoD instead
Doll WoD is good?
Yeah, pretty solid
Plus it's free to raise to +12

Not sure really
the only one I know who has anything with that is tulu
You mainly get it for the Secondary Effect
For the Flat Aliemus Battery to all of your Awakeners, after the Wielder uses their Exalt

1. gelot should get a rerun within two months, so you may not want to spend universal dupes on her. e2 + e3 both very impt
2. mouchette e1 + e2 are both very impt. i'd probably prioritize mouchette e2 with this + next month's protos
3. i think salv e0 is worth it but he's also on banner right now so if you want him you could just pull him and use the caro box on gelot instead. if you're unsure just save it and wait until the end of his banner to decide
